creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
It is best to add

${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}coreapi>=2.3.3:devel/py-coreapi@${PY_FLAVOR}

to RUN_DEPENDS. Otherwise NetBox 3.5.3 refuses to start. It could very well be that this dependency belongs elsewhere in the chain.

Nothing good happened until I built devel/py-coreapi@py39 and ran "pkg install py39-coreapi".
